title: Kazakhstan Individual Income Tax Declaration — Schedule 220.01 (Worldwide Income, Deductions, and Tax Computation)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "Форма 220.01 — Об объектах налогообложения и (или) объектах, связанных с налогообложением по исчислению индивидуального подоходного налога" (Form 220.01, worldwide income, deductions, and individual income tax computation), Appendix 1 to the Individual Income Tax Declaration (Form 220.00, `kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration`, GOV-3477). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 220.00 whenever the taxpayer marks appendix22001Attached on the main declaration, per Articles 392-393 of the Tax Code. Approved as Appendix 9 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025, published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 220.01 in full — its own taxpayer-identification header, the aggregate annual income section (line 220.01.001 through 220.01.020, covering realization income, doubtful-obligation and debt-write-off income, capital gains, derivative-instrument and long-term-contract income, digital-asset income, dividends, and exempt/adjusted income), the deductions section (220.01.021 through 220.01.042, covering cost of goods/works/services sold, itemized statutory deductions, and fixed-asset/investment-preference deductions), the taxable-income/loss computation (220.01.043 through 220.01.051, including controlled-foreign-company profit and loss carryforward), and the final tax-obligation computation (220.01.052 through 220.01.061, including personal tax deductions, the graduated 10%/15% tax-rate split, and foreign-tax and withholding credits) — leaving the nine other companion schedules (Forms 220.02 through 220.10) disclosed as separate, open backlog candidates, per the parent Form 220.00 document's own description. Several line items reference form-embedded dropdown selectors (e.g. compensation type, adjustment basis, expense/income category) whose option lists are defined by external Tax Code provisions rather than printed on the form page itself; these are modelled as free strings rather than invented enums, the same convention the parent Form 220.00 schema already established for its own currency and country-of-residence codes. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 9 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 220.01

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3484, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the first of the ten disclosed companion schedules (Form 220.01) the GOV-3477 cycle flagged as open backlog when it authored the main Form 220.00 declaration. Independently re-fetched this cycle: https://adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390, HTTP 200 via curl -k (the same TLS-chain-missing-intermediate quirk already documented for this domain in the GOV-3459/GOV-3477 cycles — a server misconfiguration, not a real access gate), text/html, 2,659,981 bytes — byte-identical to the GOV-3477 cycle's own fetch. Form 220.01 itself is embedded as five scanned page images, /files/1576/49/{171..175}.jpg, each fetched directly (curl -k, HTTP 200) and read visually at native and zoomed (2-3x, via sharp) resolution to transcribe every numbered line (220.01.001 through 220.01.061) and lettered/Roman-numeral sub-item in full. Boundary-checked against the next schedule: image 176.jpg was fetched and confirmed to be Form 220.02 page 1 ("ВЫЧЕТЫ ПО ФИКСИРОВАННЫМ АКТИВАМ") confirming Form 220.01 is exactly five pages (171-175) as the GOV-3477 cycle's own VERIFICATION.md structure list stated — this corrects the parent schema's own description text, which had estimated "Form 220.01 alone... spans 7 pages of the reference specimen"; the true figure is 5. The four repeating column headers on every amount grid (трн/млрд/млн/тыс, i.e. trillion/billion/million/thousand place-value groups) were confirmed to be a single boxed-digit money-amount entry convention, not four separate values — each numbered line is modelled as one number field in tenge, the same convention the parent Form 220.00 schema already used for its own totalCalculatedIitAmountTenge field. Several lines (e.g. 220.01.007 I, 220.01.012 III A, 220.01.018 I) print a dropdown/select box next to (or instead of) a plain label with no visible option legend on the page itself; these were modelled as free-string "type" fields paired with their own amount field, consistent with the external-classifier convention the parent schema used for currencyCode/residenceCountryCode. Item 3 on this schedule's own header (Признак видов деятельности, four numbered boxes 1-4) was checked at 3x zoom for an adjacent legend and confirmed to have none printed on the page; modelled honestly as an integer code 1-4 with the ambiguity disclosed in the field's own description rather than a guessed enum. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The taxpayer's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 220.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: taxPeriodYear
fields.label: Налоговый период, за который представляется налоговая отчетность: год
fields.description: The calendar year of the tax period for which this schedule is filed.

fields.name: activityTypeCode
fields.label: Признак видов деятельности
fields.description: Which of four activity-type categories this schedule reports on, indicated by marking one of four numbered boxes (1-4) on the form. The form page itself prints only the box numbers, not a legend of what each number designates; the underlying categorization is defined elsewhere in the Tax Code provisions this declaration implements and was not located as an embedded classifier in this specimen.

fields.name: separateAccountingActivity
fields.label: Вид деятельности, по которой ведется раздельный налоговый учет
fields.description: Whether this schedule reports on a type of activity for which the taxpayer maintains separate tax accounting.

fields.name: realizationIncome
fields.label: Доход от реализации
fields.description: Income from realization (sale) of goods, works, services, and related items — the parent line summed from the six sub-items below.

fields.name: realizationIncomeGoodsWorksServices
fields.label: доход от реализации товаров, работ, услуг
fields.description: Income from the sale of goods, works, and services.

fields.name: realizationIncomeLoanRepoRemuneration
fields.label: доход в виде вознаграждения по кредиту (займу, микрокредиту), операциям репо
fields.description: Income in the form of remuneration (interest) on a credit, loan, or microcredit, or on repo transactions.

fields.name: realizationIncomeFinanceLeaseTransfer
fields.label: доход в виде вознаграждения по передаче имущества в финансовый лизинг
fields.description: Income in the form of remuneration for transferring property under a finance lease.

fields.name: realizationIncomeRoyalty
fields.label: роялти
fields.description: Royalty income.

fields.name: realizationIncomeRental
fields.label: доход от сдачи в аренду
fields.description: Income from renting out property.

fields.name: realizationIncomeJointActivity
fields.label: доход от осуществления совместной деятельности
fields.description: Income from carrying out joint activity (a partnership/simple-partnership arrangement).

fields.name: adjudicatedPenaltiesIncome
fields.label: Присужденные или признанные должником неустойки (штрафы, пени)
fields.description: Penalties, fines, or late-payment interest awarded by a court or acknowledged by the debtor.

fields.name: doubtfulObligationsIncome
fields.label: Доход по сомнительным обязательствам
fields.description: Income from doubtful obligations — the parent line summed from the four sub-items below.

fields.name: doubtfulObligationsIncomeLoanContracts
fields.label: по сомнительным обязательствам, возникшим по договорам кредита (займа, микрокредита)
fields.description: Doubtful obligations arising from credit, loan, or microcredit agreements.

fields.name: doubtfulObligationsIncomeLeaseContracts
fields.label: по сомнительным обязательствам, возникшим по договорам лизинга
fields.description: Doubtful obligations arising from lease agreements.

fields.name: doubtfulObligationsIncomeAccruedEmployeeIncome
fields.label: по сомнительным обязательствам, возникшим по начисленным доходам работника
fields.description: Doubtful obligations arising from accrued employee income.

fields.name: doubtfulObligationsIncomeOther
fields.label: по сомнительным обязательствам, не указанным в I - III
fields.description: Doubtful obligations not covered by sub-items I-III.

fields.name: debtWriteOffIncome
fields.label: Доход от списания обязательств
fields.description: Income from the write-off of obligations — the parent line summed from the four sub-items below.

fields.name: debtWriteOffIncomeCreditorWaivedClaim
fields.label: обязательство, по которому кредитором прекращено требование к налогоплательщику о его исполнении
fields.description: An obligation for which the creditor has waived its claim against the taxpayer for performance.

fields.name: debtWriteOffIncomeUnclaimedByCreditor
fields.label: не востребованное кредитором обязательство
fields.description: An obligation not claimed by the creditor.

fields.name: debtWriteOffIncomeLimitationPeriodExpired
fields.label: обязательство, по которому в налоговом периоде истек срок исковой давности, установленный законом Республики Казахстан
fields.description: An obligation for which the statute-of-limitations period established by the law of the Republic of Kazakhstan expired during the tax period.

fields.name: debtWriteOffIncomeCourtBarredCreditor
fields.label: обязательствам, исполнение которого кредитор не вправе требовать на основании вступившего в законную силу решения суда
fields.description: An obligation whose performance the creditor is no longer entitled to demand under a court decision that has entered into legal force.

fields.name: claimAssignmentIncome
fields.label: Доходы от уступки права требования
fields.description: Income from the assignment of a right of claim — the parent line summed from the two sub-items below.

fields.name: claimAssignmentIncomeAcquired
fields.label: по приобретенному праву требования
fields.description: Income from an acquired right of claim.

fields.name: claimAssignmentIncomeAssigned
fields.label: по уступленному праву требования
fields.description: Income from an assigned right of claim.

fields.name: fixedAssetDisposalIncome
fields.label: Доход от выбытия фиксированных активов
fields.description: Income from the disposal of fixed assets.

fields.name: priorDeductionCompensationIncome
fields.label: Полученные компенсации по ранее произведенным вычетам
fields.description: Compensation received for deductions previously claimed.

fields.name: priorDeductionCompensationDetailType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of previously-claimed deduction this compensation relates to, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: priorDeductionCompensationDetailAmount
fields.label: (сумма)
fields.description: The amount of compensation received for the deduction type selected in priorDeductionCompensationDetailType.

fields.name: giftedPropertyIncome
fields.label: Доход в виде безвозмездно полученного имущества
fields.description: Income in the form of property received free of charge.

fields.name: businessSaleIncome
fields.label: Доход (убыток) от продажи предприятия как имущественного комплекса
fields.description: Income (loss) from the sale of an enterprise as a property complex.

fields.name: inventoryValuationMethodChangeIncome
fields.label: Положительная разница при применении нового метода оценки запасов
fields.description: Positive difference arising from applying a new inventory valuation method.

fields.name: landfillFundMisuseIncome
fields.label: Доход от нецелевого использования средств ликвидационного фонда полигонов захоронения отходов
fields.description: Income from the non-designated use of funds from a waste-landfill decommissioning fund.

fields.name: capitalGainIncome
fields.label: Доход от прироста стоимости, в том числе по:
fields.description: Income from capital gains — the parent line summed from the nine sub-items below.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeLandPlots
fields.label: земельным участкам
fields.description: Capital gain from land plots.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeInvestmentGold
fields.label: инвестиционному золоту
fields.description: Capital gain from investment gold.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeSecurities
fields.label: ценным бумагам
fields.description: Capital gain from securities.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeSecuritiesType
fields.label: вид
fields.description: The specific type of security this capital gain relates to, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeParticipationShare
fields.label: доле участия
fields.description: Capital gain from a participation share.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeUnfinishedConstruction
fields.label: объектам незавершенного строительства
fields.description: Capital gain from unfinished-construction objects.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeUninstalledMachinery
fields.label: неустановленным машинам и оборудованию
fields.description: Capital gain from uninstalled machinery and equipment.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeOtherLongLivedAssets
fields.label: активам со сроком службы более 1 года, не относимые к фиксированным активам, запасам или цифровым активам (в т.ч. долгосрочные активы, предназначенные для продажи)
fields.description: Capital gain from assets with a service life of more than one year that are not classified as fixed assets, inventory, or digital assets (including long-term assets held for sale).

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeOtherNonDepreciableAssets
fields.label: прочим активам, не подлежащим амортизации
fields.description: Capital gain from other non-depreciable assets.

fields.name: capitalGainIncomeAssetsFullyDeducted
fields.label: по активам, стоимость которых полностью отнесена на вычеты
fields.description: Capital gain from assets whose value has been fully claimed as a deduction.

fields.name: derivativeFinancialInstrumentIncome
fields.label: Доход по производным финансовым инструментам, используемым:
fields.description: Income from derivative financial instruments — the parent line summed from the three sub-items below.

fields.name: derivativeFinancialInstrumentIncomeHedging
fields.label: в целях хеджирования
fields.description: Derivative income used for hedging purposes.

fields.name: derivativeFinancialInstrumentIncomeUnderlyingDelivery
fields.label: в целях поставки базового актива
fields.description: Derivative income used for delivery of the underlying asset.

fields.name: derivativeFinancialInstrumentIncomeOtherPurposes
fields.label: в иных целях
fields.description: Derivative income used for other purposes.

fields.name: longTermContractIncome
fields.label: Доход по долгосрочному контракту
fields.description: Income from a long-term contract — the parent line summed from the two sub-items below.

fields.name: longTermContractIncomeActualCostMethod
fields.label: при применении фактического метода
fields.description: Long-term contract income computed under the actual-cost method.

fields.name: longTermContractIncomeCompletionMethod
fields.label: метод завершения
fields.description: Long-term contract income computed under the completion method.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncome
fields.label: Доход лиц, осуществляющих операции с цифровыми активами
fields.description: Income of persons carrying out transactions with digital assets — the parent line summed from the five sub-items below.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncomeMiner
fields.label: доход лица, осуществляющего цифровой майнинг
fields.description: Income of a person carrying out digital mining.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncomeMiningPool
fields.label: доход цифрового майнингового пула
fields.description: Income of a digital mining pool.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncomeExchange
fields.label: доход биржи цифровых активов
fields.description: Income of a digital asset exchange.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncomeDisposalCapitalGain
fields.label: доход от прироста стоимости при выбытии цифровых активов
fields.description: Income from capital gain on the disposal of digital assets.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncomeOther
fields.label: прочее
fields.description: Other digital-asset-related income.

fields.name: digitalAssetIncomeOtherType
fields.label: прочее (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of other digital-asset-related income, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: dividendIncome
fields.label: Дивиденды
fields.description: Dividend income.

fields.name: exchangeRateGainExcessIncome
fields.label: Превышение суммы положительной курсовой разницы над суммой отрицательной курсовой разницы
fields.description: The excess of positive exchange-rate differences over negative exchange-rate differences.

fields.name: otherIncome
fields.label: Другие доходы, в том числе:
fields.description: Other income — the parent line for the detail below.

fields.name: otherIncomeDetailType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of other income, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: otherIncomeDetailAmount
fields.label: (сумма)
fields.description: The amount of other income for the type selected in otherIncomeDetailType.

fields.name: foreignSourceIncome
fields.label: Доходы из иностранных источников
fields.description: Income from foreign sources.

fields.name: adjustedAggregateAnnualIncome
fields.label: СОВОКУПНЫЙ ГОДОВОЙ ДОХОД с учетом уменьшения, корректировки и освобождений (сумма доходов с 220.01.001 по 220.01.019 - (+) 220.01.020 I - 220.01.021 II - 220.01.021 III)
fields.description: Aggregate annual income after reduction, adjustment, and exemptions — computed from the sum of lines 220.01.001 through 220.01.019, adjusted by the sub-items below.

fields.name: incomeAdjustment
fields.label: Корректировка доходов
fields.description: An adjustment to income.

fields.name: incomeAdjustmentType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific basis for the income adjustment, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: transferPricingAdjustment
fields.label: в соответствии с Законом о трансфертном ценообразовании
fields.description: An adjustment made under the Transfer Pricing Law.

fields.name: article255IncomeReduction
fields.label: Уменьшение совокупного годового дохода в соответствии со статьей 255 Налогового кодекса, в том числе:
fields.description: A reduction of aggregate annual income under Article 255 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: article255IncomeReductionType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific basis for the Article 255 reduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: exemptIncome
fields.label: Доход, освобождаемый от налогообложения, в том числе:
fields.description: Income exempt from taxation — the parent line summed from the two sub-items below.

fields.name: exemptIncomeInternationalTreaty
fields.label: доход, освобождаемый от налогообложения, в соответствии с международными договорами (итоговое значение графы Е формы 220.03)
fields.description: Income exempt from taxation under international treaties — the final value of column E of Form 220.03.

fields.name: exemptIncomeAifcLaw
fields.label: доход, освобождаемый в соответствии Конституционным законом РК «О МФЦА»
fields.description: Income exempt under the Constitutional Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On the AIFC".

fields.name: soldGoodsExpense
fields.label: Расходы по реализованным товарам, работам, услугам (220.01.021 I - 220.01.021 II + 220.01.021 III + 220.01.021 IV + 220.01.021 V - 220.01.021 VI - 220.01.021 VII - 220.01.021 VIII - 220.01.021 IX)
fields.description: Expenses on realized goods, works, and services — computed from the sub-items below.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseOpeningInventory
fields.label: Запасы на начало налогового периода
fields.description: Inventory at the start of the tax period.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseClosingInventory
fields.label: Запасы на конец налогового периода
fields.description: Inventory at the end of the tax period.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredInventoryWorksServices
fields.label: Приобретено запасов, работ и услуг, в том числе:
fields.description: Inventory, works, and services acquired during the period — the parent line summed from the eight sub-items below.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredInventory
fields.label: Запасы
fields.description: Acquired inventory.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredFinancialServices
fields.label: финансовые услуги
fields.description: Acquired financial services.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredAdvertisingServices
fields.label: рекламные услуги
fields.description: Acquired advertising services.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredConsultingServices
fields.label: консультационные услуги
fields.description: Acquired consulting services.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredMarketingServices
fields.label: маркетинговые услуги
fields.description: Acquired marketing services.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredDesignServices
fields.label: дизайнерские услуги
fields.description: Acquired design services.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredEngineeringServices
fields.label: инжиниринговые услуги
fields.description: Acquired engineering services.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseAcquiredOtherServices
fields.label: прочие услуги работы
fields.description: Other acquired services or works.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseEmployeeIncomeAndPayments
fields.label: Расходы по начисленным доходам работников и иным выплатам физическим лицам
fields.description: Expenses on accrued employee income and other payments to individuals.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseDeferredFromPriorPeriods
fields.label: Стоимость работ и услуг, себестоимость запасов, признанные расходами будущих периодов в предыдущих налоговых периодах и относимые на вычеты в отчетном налоговом периоде
fields.description: Cost of works, services, and inventory recognized as deferred expenses in prior tax periods and deductible in the reporting period.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseRecognizedAsSubsequentExpenses
fields.label: Стоимость работ и услуг, себестоимость запасов, признаваемые последующими расходами
fields.description: Cost of works, services, and inventory recognized as subsequent expenses.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseCapitalizedIntoFixedAssets
fields.label: Стоимость работ и услуг, себестоимость запасов, включаемые в первоначальную стоимость фиксированных активов, объектов преференций, активов, не подлежащих амортизации
fields.description: Cost of works, services, and inventory included in the initial value of fixed assets, preference objects, or non-depreciable assets.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseNonDeductibleArticle286
fields.label: Стоимость работ и услуг, себестоимость запасов, не относимые на вычеты на основании статьи 286 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: Cost of works, services, and inventory not deductible under Article 286 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: soldGoodsExpenseDeferredToFuturePeriods
fields.label: Стоимость работ и услуг, себестоимость запасов, признаваемые расходами будущих периодов и подлежащие отнесению на вычеты в последующие налоговые периоды
fields.description: Cost of works, services, and inventory recognized as deferred expenses to be deducted in future tax periods.

fields.name: specificExpenseTypeDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты по отдельным видам расходов
fields.description: Deductions for certain specified types of expenses.

fields.name: specificExpenseTypeDeductionType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of expense being deducted, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: specificExpenseTypeDeductionAmount
fields.label: (сумма)
fields.description: The amount deducted for the expense type selected in specificExpenseTypeDeductionType.

fields.name: vatDeduction
fields.label: Вычет налога на добавленную стоимость
fields.description: Value-added tax deduction.

fields.name: travelCompensationDeduction
fields.label: Вычет сумм компенсаций при командировках
fields.description: Deduction of business-trip compensation amounts.

fields.name: boardMemberTravelCompensationDeduction
fields.label: Вычет компенсаций по поездкам членов совета директоров или иного органа управления
fields.description: Deduction of trip compensation for members of the board of directors or other governing body.

fields.name: representationExpenseDeduction
fields.label: Вычет представительских расходов
fields.description: Deduction of representation expenses.

fields.name: remunerationDeduction
fields.label: Вычет по вознаграждению
fields.description: Deduction for remuneration (interest) paid.

fields.name: nonResidentRelatedPartySettlementDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты по взаиморасчетам с нерезидентом - взаимосвязанной стороной
fields.description: Deductions for settlements with a non-resident related party.

fields.name: paidObligationsDeduction
fields.label: Вычет по выплаченным обязательствам
fields.description: Deduction for obligations paid.

fields.name: writtenOffClaimDeduction
fields.label: Вычет по списанному требованию
fields.description: Deduction for a written-off claim.

fields.name: doubtfulClaimsDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты по сомнительным требованиям
fields.description: Deductions for doubtful claims.

fields.name: landfillLiquidationExpenseDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты по расходам на ликвидацию полигонов захоронения отходов и сумм отчислений в ликвидационный фонд полигонов захоронения отходов
fields.description: Deductions for waste-landfill decommissioning expenses and contributions to the landfill decommissioning fund.

fields.name: rdAndIpExpenseDeduction
fields.label: Вычет по расходам на научно-исследовательские, научно-технические и опытно-конструкторские работы, приобретение исключительных прав на объекты интеллектуальной собственности и на создание научных центров
fields.description: Deduction for R&D, scientific-technical, and design-engineering expenses, acquisition of exclusive intellectual-property rights, and establishment of science centers.

fields.name: employeeIncomeAndNonIncomeExpenseDeduction
fields.label: Вычет расходов по начисленным доходам работников и отдельных расходов работодателя, которые не являются доходом физического лица
fields.description: Deduction of expenses on accrued employee income and certain employer expenses that do not constitute income of an individual.

fields.name: exchangeRateDifferenceDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты по курсовой разнице
fields.description: Deductions for exchange-rate differences.

fields.name: taxesAndBudgetPaymentsDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты налогов и платежей в бюджет
fields.description: Deductions for taxes and budget payments.

fields.name: subsequentExpensesDeduction
fields.label: Вычеты последующих расходов
fields.description: Deductions for subsequent expenses.

fields.name: fixedAssetDeduction
fields.label: Вычет по фиксированным активам
fields.description: Deduction for fixed assets, computed on the companion Form 220.02 schedule.

fields.name: investmentTaxPreferenceDeduction
fields.label: Вычет по инвестиционным налоговым преференциям
fields.description: Deduction for investment tax preferences.

fields.name: otherDeductions
fields.label: Другие вычеты
fields.description: Other deductions not covered by the preceding lines.

fields.name: totalDeductions
fields.label: Итого вычетов (или 220.01.041 I, или 220.01.041 II)
fields.description: Total deductions — either line I or line II below, as applicable.

fields.name: totalDeductionsSumLines021To040
fields.label: Вычеты (сумма с 220.01.021 по 220.01.040)
fields.description: The sum of deduction lines 220.01.021 through 220.01.040.

fields.name: totalDeductionsAifcParticipantExpenses
fields.label: Всего расходов, подлежащих отнесению на вычеты участниками МФЦА
fields.description: Total expenses deductible by AIFC participants, used instead of totalDeductionsSumLines021To040 where applicable.

fields.name: totalDeductionsAdjusted
fields.label: ВСЕГО ВЫЧЕТОВ с учётом корректировки (220.01.041 + (-) 220.01.042 I + (-) 220.01.042 II)
fields.description: Total deductions after adjustment.

fields.name: totalDeductionsAdjustmentTaxCode
fields.label: Корректировка в соответствии с Налоговым кодексом
fields.description: An adjustment to total deductions made under the Tax Code.

fields.name: totalDeductionsAdjustmentTaxCodeType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific Tax Code basis for the adjustment, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: totalDeductionsAdjustmentTransferPricing
fields.label: Корректировка в соответствии с Законом о трансфертном ценообразовании
fields.description: An adjustment to total deductions made under the Transfer Pricing Law.

fields.name: taxableIncome
fields.label: ОБЛАГАЕМЫЙ ДОХОД (220.01.020-220.01.041)
fields.description: Taxable income, computed as line 220.01.020 minus line 220.01.041.

fields.name: taxLoss
fields.label: УБЫТОК (220.01.020-220.01.042)
fields.description: Tax loss, computed as line 220.01.020 minus line 220.01.042.

fields.name: cfcAggregateProfit
fields.label: Суммарная прибыль КИК и ПУ КИК
fields.description: Aggregate profit of controlled foreign companies (CFC) and their permanent establishments.

fields.name: cfcAggregateProfitArticle339Losses
fields.label: Убытки, определенные частью второй пункта 1 статьи 339 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: Losses determined under the second part of paragraph 1 of Article 339 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: cfcTaxableIncomeAfterLossCarryforward
fields.label: Облагаемый доход КИК и ПУ КИК с учетом перенесенных убытков (220.01.045 - 220.01.045 I)
fields.description: Taxable income of the CFC and its permanent establishment after carried-forward losses.

fields.name: longTermTangibleAssetDisposalLoss
fields.label: Убыток от выбытия долгосрочных материальных активов
fields.description: Loss from the disposal of long-term tangible assets — the parent line summed from the four sub-items below.

fields.name: longTermTangibleAssetDisposalLossGroupIFixedAssets
fields.label: от выбытия фиксированных активов группы I
fields.description: Loss from the disposal of Group I fixed assets.

fields.name: longTermTangibleAssetDisposalLossUnfinishedConstruction
fields.label: от выбытия объектов незавершенного строительства
fields.description: Loss from the disposal of unfinished-construction objects.

fields.name: longTermTangibleAssetDisposalLossUninstalledMachinery
fields.label: от выбытия неустановленных машин и оборудования
fields.description: Loss from the disposal of uninstalled machinery and equipment.

fields.name: longTermTangibleAssetDisposalLossOtherLongLivedAssets
fields.label: от выбытия активов со сроком службы более одного года, не относимых к фиксированным активам или запасам
fields.description: Loss from the disposal of assets with a service life of more than one year that are not classified as fixed assets or inventory.

fields.name: taxableIncomeReduction
fields.label: Уменьшение облагаемого дохода (220.01.048 I +220.01.048 II)
fields.description: Reduction of taxable income — the sum of the two sub-items below.

fields.name: taxableIncomeReductionExpenseAmount
fields.label: Уменьшение облагаемого дохода на следующие виды расходов
fields.description: Reduction of taxable income for the expense type selected in taxableIncomeReductionExpenseType.

fields.name: taxableIncomeReductionExpenseType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of expense underlying the taxable-income reduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: taxableIncomeReductionIncomeAmount
fields.label: Уменьшение облагаемого дохода на следующие виды доходов
fields.description: Reduction of taxable income for the income type selected in taxableIncomeReductionIncomeType.

fields.name: taxableIncomeReductionIncomeType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of income underlying the taxable-income reduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: taxableIncomeAfterReduction
fields.label: Облагаемый доход с учетом уменьшения (220.01.043- 220.01.048)
fields.description: Taxable income after the reduction on line 220.01.048.

fields.name: lossCarriedForwardFromPriorPeriods
fields.label: Убытки, перенесенные из предыдущих налоговых периодов
fields.description: Losses carried forward from prior tax periods.

fields.name: lossToBeCarriedForward
fields.label: Убыток, подлежащий переносу (220.01.044+220.01.047+220.01.050)
fields.description: Loss to be carried forward to future tax periods.

fields.name: taxableIncomeAfterLossCarryforward
fields.label: ОБЛАГАЕМЫЙ ДОХОД С УЧЕТОМ ПЕРЕНЕСЕННЫХ УБЫТКОВ (220.01.049 - 220.01.050)
fields.description: Taxable income after applying carried-forward losses.

fields.name: article400TaxableIncomeReduction
fields.label: Уменьшение облагаемого дохода (в соответствии с пунктом 1 статьи 400 Налогового кодекса), в том числе:
fields.description: A reduction of taxable income under paragraph 1 of Article 400 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: article400TaxableIncomeReductionType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific basis for the Article 400 reduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: personalTaxDeductions
fields.label: Личные налоговые вычеты физического лица (в соответствии со статьей 401 Налогового кодекса)
fields.description: Personal tax deductions of the individual under Article 401 of the Tax Code — the parent line summed from the three sub-items below.

fields.name: socialPaymentsTaxDeduction
fields.label: налоговый вычет социальных платежей, в том числе:
fields.description: Tax deduction for social payments.

fields.name: socialPaymentsTaxDeductionType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of social payment underlying the deduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: basicTaxDeduction
fields.label: базовый налоговый вычет
fields.description: The basic tax deduction.

fields.name: socialTaxDeductions
fields.label: социальные налоговые вычеты, в том числе:
fields.description: Social tax deductions.

fields.name: socialTaxDeductionsType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of social tax deduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: individualEntrepreneurTaxableIncomeAmount
fields.label: Облагаемая сумма дохода Индивидуального предпринимателя (220.01.052 -220.01.053 - 220.01.054)
fields.description: The taxable income amount of the individual entrepreneur.

fields.name: iitOnTaxableIncome
fields.label: ИПН с облагаемой суммы дохода (220.01.056 I +220.01.056 II)
fields.description: Individual income tax (IIT) on the taxable income amount — the sum of the two rate-based sub-items below.

fields.name: iitOnTaxableIncomeRate10
fields.label: ИПН с облагаемой суммы дохода по ставке 10 % (220.01.055 x 10%)
fields.description: IIT on the taxable income amount at the 10% rate.

fields.name: iitOnTaxableIncomeRate15
fields.label: ИПН с облагаемой суммы дохода по ставке 15 % (220.01.055 x 15%)
fields.description: IIT on the taxable income amount at the 15% rate.

fields.name: calculatedIitAmount
fields.label: Исчисленная сумма ИПН (220.01.056 - 220.01.057 I - 220.01.057 II - 220.01.057 III - 220.01.057 IV - 220.01.057 V)
fields.description: The calculated IIT amount after the credits and withholdings on the five sub-items below.

fields.name: foreignTaxCreditArticle413
fields.label: Зачет иностранного налога в соответствии со статьей 413 Налогового кодекса (итоговое значение графы Н формы 220.04)
fields.description: Credit for foreign tax paid under Article 413 of the Tax Code — the final value of column H of Form 220.04.

fields.name: iitWithheldAtSourceWinningsRemuneration
fields.label: ИПН, удержанный у источника выплаты, в том числе с выигрышей и вознаграждений (в соответствии со статьей 440 Налогового кодекса)
fields.description: IIT withheld at the source of payment, including on winnings and remuneration, under Article 440 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: iitWithheldAtSourceWinningsRemunerationType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific type of payment underlying the withheld IIT, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: iitWithheldAtSourceArticle441
fields.label: ИПН, удержанный у источника выплаты (в соответствии со статьей 441 Налогового кодекса)
fields.description: IIT withheld at the source of payment under Article 441 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: iitWithheldAtSourceCarriedFromPriorPeriods
fields.label: ИПН, удержанный у источника выплаты с дохода, переносимый из предыдущих налоговых периодов
fields.description: IIT withheld at the source of payment on income carried forward from prior tax periods.

fields.name: iitWithheldAtSourceArticles690691
fields.label: ИПН, удержанный у источника выплаты в соответствии со статьями 690 и 691 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: IIT withheld at the source of payment under Articles 690 and 691 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: iitReductionUnderTaxLegislation
fields.label: Уменьшение ИПН в соответствии с налоговым законодательством, в том числе:
fields.description: A reduction of IIT under tax legislation.

fields.name: iitReductionUnderTaxLegislationType
fields.label: (вид)
fields.description: The specific legislative basis for the IIT reduction, chosen from a form dropdown whose option list is not embedded in this specimen (an external classifier).

fields.name: cfcIitUnderArticle399
fields.label: ИПН с облагаемого дохода КИК и ПУ КИК в соответствии со статьей 399 Налогового кодекса (220.01.046 x 220.01.056 I + 220.01.046 x 220.01.056 II)
fields.description: IIT on the taxable income of the CFC and its permanent establishment under Article 399 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: cfcForeignTaxCreditArticle414
fields.label: Зачет иностранного налога с финансовой прибыли КИК или ПУ КИК (статья 414 Налогового кодекса)
fields.description: Credit for foreign tax paid on the financial profit of the CFC or its permanent establishment, under Article 414 of the Tax Code.

fields.name: cfcTotalIitAfterCredit
fields.label: Всего ИПН КИК и ПУ КИК в соответствии со статьей 399 Налогового кодекса с учетом зачета (220.01.059 - 220.01.059 I)
fields.description: Total IIT of the CFC and its permanent establishment under Article 399 of the Tax Code, after the foreign tax credit.

fields.name: totalIitAmount
fields.label: ВСЕГО СУММА ИПН (220.01.057 - 220.01.058+ 220.01.060)
fields.description: The total IIT amount for this schedule — summed across every attached Form 220.01 schedule into the main declaration's own totalCalculatedIitAmountTenge line.
